chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-795 of 2009 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of M.A. 768/2012 20.04.2022 Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. Sindh. ----- Petitioner who is appearing in person is constantly called absent. We have gone through few dates of hearing which disclose that the petitioner was called absent on 01.03.2018, 01.03.2022, 15.03.2022, 05.04.2022 and so also today. On the last date only as an indulgence the matter was adjourned for today. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
